questions.q: AR Rahman's debut Tamil film score, which put him on the map in 1992.
Ilaiyaraaja is revered by this Tamil honorific meaning 'Music Sage'.
AR Rahman won two Academy Awards in 2009 for this film's music and song 'Jai Ho'.
Ilaiyaraaja became the first Asian to record an orchestral album at Abbey Road Studios, London in 1993. Name that album.
AR Rahman composed the iconic love anthem 'Vennilave Vennilave' for this 1997 Mani Ratnam film.
